programme.title: John Torode's Asia - EP 2
programme.desc: In this episode John Torode is in the holy city of Amritsar in the Punjab region of northern India only a few miles from the border with Pakistan. His first outing takes him to the Golden Temple where every Sikh hopes to make a pilgrimage at least once in their lifetime. What’s remarkable about this site besides the temple itself is that it provides free meals to as many as 100,000 people per day, regardless of religion, colour or wealth.

programme.title: White Cat Legend - EP 31
programme.desc: The story is set in the divine capital under the rule of the Empress. During a grand night banquet at the Tang Palace, Li Bing, who is favored by the Empress, is appointed as the Vice Minister of the Ministry of Justice. In the Ministry of Justice, Chen Shi, Wang Qi, Alibaba, Cui Bei, and Sun Bao, under the leadership of the new Vice Minister, the White Cat Li Bing, work together to clear the layers of mystery surrounding the divine capital.

programme.title: Neng Urut Senyummu Emang Paling Kyut
programme.desc: Bondan was fired from his job. On his way home, Bondan was riding his motorcycle in a daze until he fell off. When he got home, his mother asked him to get a massage. While Bondan was sleeping, Seruni secretly massaged his feet.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE - EP 24
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine — from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021 - EP 67
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: Mahkotamu Jatuh King Of Supir Taksi
programme.desc: Tells the story of the life of a beautiful girl named Lisa. It is said that Lisa always experiences bad luck in love. Starting from her boyfriend named Raka, who cheated on her with her own best friend. Until Lisa's life is turned upside down, until she becomes a car washer at a car wash. However, there is a taxi driver who has been accompanying Lisa. Until Lisa falls in love with him. Previously, Laras was the first passenger when Beni pulled a taxi. So Laras got a rose. Strangely, suddenly Beni decided to call his love with Lisa, ""I want us to break up!"" said Beni while handing the ring to Lisa. Lisa was very sad because of this, especially since Beni chose to be Lisa's friend's new boyfriend. Is all this just Lisa's nightmare, who is always cheated on by her boyfriends?

programme.title: Mental Cintanya Siap Siap Kena Rental
programme.desc: Nasha (Syahnaz Sadiqah), a beautiful girl from a humble family, works as a cleaning service in an office. One day, while Nasha is working in the office, her boss, Elang (Jeff Smith), passes by. Due to some circumstances, a misunderstanding occurs between Nasha and Elang, leading to an argument.

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021 - EP 67
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: HIKMAH - EP 14
programme.desc: A reality show that encapsulates everyday life stories, personal trials, and spiritual journeys. The program is rich in moral values, showcasing individuals as they navigate complex life dilemmas until they ultimately uncover the silver lining and wisdom behind every trial they endure

programme.title: NAWAITU SURGA - EP 16
programme.desc: This program, which focuses on Islamic jurisprudence and Sufism, draws from everyday life stories and is delivered by highly knowledgeable Ustaz. Its aim is to enlighten us Muslims and guide us toward the ultimate goal of life: Jannah, or God's paradise.

programme.title: ABANG KEMBANG DIUBER MANTAN
programme.desc: A bizarre flower garland carried by Arhan turns out to be an unexpected blessing in disguise. Despite its strange contents and the endless, chaotic twists of fate it causes, the quirky arrangement ultimately leads Arhan straight to his true soulmate

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 218
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Biarin Aja Aku Cinta Kamu Selama Gak Makan Ternak Warga
programme.desc: Determined to escape an arranged marriage orchestrated by her father, Winda (Shanice Margaretha) flees her home. During her frantic escape, her car accidentally hits Timmy, a prized goat belonging to Ikbal (Kevin Hillers). Horrified by the accident, Winda takes full responsibility and joins Ikbal’s group, promising to care for the injured goat while hiding from her past

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 20
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 166
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: ABANG KEMBANG DIUBER MANTAN

programme.title: KUE BOLU BIKIN RINDUNYA VALID NO DEBAT
programme.desc: Ryan is furious when the feisty Dinar mistakes him for a humble motorcycle taxi driver. However, their chaotic and explosive first encounter sets off an unexpected chain of events that accidentally drags them straight to the altar.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 218
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Tutor Dapat Restu Mami Pliss
programme.desc: While most kids are proud of having a beautiful mother, Maura (Flavio Zaviera) finds it exhausting because her gorgeous mom, Mili, always steals the spotlight. To make matters worse, Maura is socially awkward around guys-getting tongue-tied around ordinary boys and completely freezing near handsome ones. Consequently, whenever the charming Arsena (Fattah Syah) visits, Maura puts up a cold, grumpy front out of pure panic, often running away mid-conversation

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 20
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: Mundur Wir, Aku Jadian Sama Bodyguardku
programme.desc: After Rindu (Rayna Snova) courageously foils a robbery and saves Arga, a grateful Arga wants to hire her as his personal bodyguard. However, Arga's girlfriend has already hired a tough professional named Rendy (Jeff Smith) for the job. To settle who is worthy, the young girl and Rendy face off in an intense duel. Impressed by their fierce combat skills, Arga makes a bold decision: he hires both of them to protect him

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 167
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: ABANG LAYANG LAYANG GAMONIN AYANG
programme.desc: The never-ending feud between Hardi Fadhillah and Josephine Firmstone shows no signs of slowing down. Hardi, a passionate kite chaser, constantly clashes with Josephine, a local kite vendor. While Hardi just wants to indulge in his favorite hobby, Josephine is constantly terrified that his reckless running will drive away her customers and ruin her displays

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 219
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Kabarnya Sampai Saat Ini Mereka Masih Saling Sayang
programme.desc: Rahayu's (Rachquel Nesia) desperate prayers are answered instantly when Nando (Ikbal Fauzi), a wealthy tycoon, suddenly appears and offers to marry her on the spot. Shocked by this sudden stroke of luck, Rahayu becomes deeply suspicious, convinced that Nando is pulling an elaborate scam on her.

programme.title: BADUT KOK NANGIS, KATANYA KUAT
programme.desc: Ayu's life takes a tragic turn when her happy world shatters following the untimely death of her beloved father. Left alone to fend for herself, she is thrust into a harsh reality, facing endless misery and struggles to survive.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 220
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Lele Hati Ini Meyakinkan, Cinta Ini Mematilku
programme.desc: Dumped by his girlfriend right after losing a race, Argo is labeled a total loser. To save face, he crosses paths with Nurlela, a beautiful catfish farmer, and impulsively introduces her to his ex as his new girlfriend. Argo strikes a deal, promising to do anything if she plays along. However, the ruse backfires when Nurlela's real boyfriend finds out, branding her a cheater and forcing the truth to light.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 22

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 45
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Awak Suka Saya Tak? - EP 13
programme.desc: Intan mencintai Hilman Yong, Sejak kemalangan berlaku Hilman hilang menjadi Damien Yong. Kini Intan terpaksa menyayangi bekas suaminya dari jauh dan menunggu Hilman kembali kepadanya.

programme.title: Expose Mistik: Kisah Seram - EP 12
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan seram untuk tontonan.

programme.title: Kennot Brain - EP 23
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Isteri VS. Tunang - EP 4
programme.desc: Alana Sofea, seorang gadis yang berterus terang, mencabar ego Zaim Azfar, seorang lelaki yang sombong dan angkuh, lalu membawa mereka ke dalam perkahwinan yang tidak dijangka.

programme.title: Keluarga Iskandar - EP 2
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang seorang ibu tunggal, Mak Jah dan kisah kehidupannya bersama lapan orang anaknya yang sudah dewasa.

programme.title: Cik Reen Encik Ngok Ngek - EP 15
programme.desc: Azreen dan Harris terpaksa berkahwin apabila adik mereka melarikan diri pada malam sebelum bernikah. Adakah perkahwinan Harris dan Azreen akan berkekalan selepas Roadtrip Misadventures mereka?

programme.title: 3 dara kg.com - EP 7
programme.desc: 3 Dara nak buat bisnes produk kecantikan sendiri menggunakan modal pinjaman dari Tabung JKK Kampung Kembang Kempis. Mereka ditipu oleh Kulup Q , di mana duit dah dibayar tetapi barang tak dapat.

programme.title: Motif Sosial? - EP 13
programme.desc: Kesinambungan Motif Viral, kali ini melalui eksperimen sosial yang viral dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Punchline - EP 10
programme.desc: Lebih meriah, lebih kecoh! Saksikan program variasi terbaharu yang menampilkan Dato' AC Mizal beraksi bersama PS Mansur dan tetamu jemputan yang bakal membuat anda tidak kering gusi!

programme.title: Elak Elak - EP 7
programme.desc: Edisi Istimewa Lawak Siang dan Malam bersama Elak - Elak.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat S2 - EP 7
programme.desc: Dato’ AC Mizal kini Kembali Bersama geng latah seperti Eida Moin, PS Mansur, Wan Raja Lawak dan ramai lagi dalam musim terbaru Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat.

programme.title: Bujang 40 - EP 8
programme.desc: Sebuah drama untuk tontonan semua.

programme.desc: Rancangan yang memaparkan Zero sebagai sebuah kumpulan lawak di atas satu pentas.

programme.title: Buana Oh Buana - EP 11
programme.desc: Sitcom komedi yang berkisahkan kehidupan masyarakat yang tinggal di kampung dan bandar dengan isu-isu yang berbangkit lakonan Ajak, Yassin dan Shuib

programme.title: Wartawan Kampung
programme.desc: Mustaqim yang tidak habis belajar, pulang ke kampung mewujudkan laman web kampung disokong Tok Ketua Kampung Kambing.

programme.title: Keluarga Iskandar - EP 3
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang seorang ibu tunggal, Mak Jah dan kisah kehidupannya bersama lapan orang anaknya yang sudah dewasa.

programme.title: Karoot Komedia - EP 10
programme.desc: Karoot Komedia adalah sebuah rancangan komedi muzikal yang menggabungkan muzik, lakonan sketsa dengan topik-topik menarik yang akan dilakonkan secara spontan oleh pelawak terkenal Malaysia

programme.title: Jihan Show S2 - EP 10
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: RI-OH RIMBA - EP 2
programme.desc: Amir Sisi cabar Hawa, Putera, Ikhmal dan Atu buat cabaran di Kampung Orang Asli?! Macam mana agaknya reaksi mereka dalam Rioh Rimba ni?!

programme.title: Rumah Memori - EP 8
programme.desc: Program ini akan menguji daya ingatan para selebriti popular tanah air sama ada mereka masih ingat akan peristiwa atau kejadian aneh & pelik yang berlaku dalam kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2024 - EP 5
programme.desc: Sebuah program menarik untuk tontona semua.

programme.title: Klik Riders - EP 24
programme.desc: Rancangan hiburan untuk seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Boss Kira S2 - EP 8
programme.desc: Roy Azman, Syafa, & Haiqal, berentap sesama sendiri untuk mendapatkan hadiah lumayan dengan syarat, perlu bermain & meneka samada berat, tinggi, panjang, & harga objek di hadapan mereka

programme.title: Betul Ke Bohong ? - EP 6

programme.title: Waqt: The Race Against Time
programme.desc: Patriarch Ishwar Chandra Thakur's peaceful life shatters when his lazy son Adiya marries an enemy's daughter, forcing Ishwar to teach him hard lessons about struggle and survival. Release Year: 2005 Director: Yash Chopra

programme.title: Sanam Teri Kasam
programme.desc: Thrown out by her own family, a young woman finds support from a loyal ally, forming a bond that survives repeated hardships and unexpected twists of fate.

programme.title: Chintu Ka Birthday
programme.desc: This film is set during the US invasion of Iraq where amidst all the danger, an Indian family awaiting its return to India struggles to celebrate the birthday of its youngest member. Release Year: 2019 Director: Devanshu Singh, Satyanshu Singh

programme.title: Despatch
programme.desc: Veteran crime journalist Joy feels outdated in a hyper-digital world. Chasing a fresh story, he uncovers buried truths that challenge power, media ethics, and his conscience deeply forever. Release Year: 2024 Director: Kanu Behl.

programme.title: Gangaajal
programme.desc: IPS Amit Kumar is posted to a lawless town and battles corrupt cops and brutal criminals, standing firm against danger to restore justice and order. Release Year: 2003 Director: Prakash Jha Awards: Best Screenplay Prakash Jha

programme.title: Cheeni Kum
programme.desc: Buddhadev Gupta Amitabh Bachchan, a 64-year-old chef in London, falls in love with Nina Verma Tabu, a woman 30 years his junior. Their unconventional romance faces societal challenges, especially from Nina's father, who is six years younger than Buddhadev. Release Year: 2007 Director: R. Balki Awards: Filmfare Awards- Best Actor Female Critics - Tabu

programme.title: Chor Machaye Shor
programme.desc: A clever thief disguises himself as a cop to recover his stolen diamond from police headquarters, gaining the ACP's trust while a sharp colleague grows suspicious of him. Release Year: 2002 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Aparichit - The Stranger
programme.desc: Timid Ambi who suffers from multiple personality disorder becomes Aparichit who does not think twice about killing wrong-doers.

programme.title: Kakuda
programme.desc: Haunted by a village curse predicting her husband's death in thirteen days, a newlywed bride seeks a ghost hunter's help to save the man she loves desperately tonight. Release Year: 2024 Director: Aditya Sarpotdar

programme.title: Pukar
programme.desc: Anjali Madhuri loves Major Jaidev Anil Kapoor. But Jaidev loves Pooja. An embittered Anjali swears vengeance. Jaidevs enemies use Anjali to settle scores with him.2000 Release Year: 2000 Director: Rajkumar Santoshi Awards: 2001 Nominee Filmfare AwardBest ActorAnil Kapoor

programme.title: Aparichit - The Stranger
programme.desc: Timid Ambi who suffers from multiple personality disorder becomes Aparichit who does not think twice about killing wrong-doers.

programme.title: Badhaai Ho Badhaai
programme.desc: Anjali and Steven fall in love and elope. This brings an end to the friendship between the two families. Release Year: 2002 Director: Satish Kaushik

programme.title: Krazzy 4
programme.desc: 4 mental patients formulate the plan to rescue their kidnapped doctor and teach the kidnappers a lesson. Release Year: 2008 Director: Jaideep Sen Awards: Screen Award 2009 for Best Supporting Actor

programme.title: Big Dhamaka
programme.desc: Two lookalikes from opposite worlds fall for the same woman, and a shocking link between them turns confusion into chaos, changing all their lives.

programme.title: Gangaajal
programme.desc: IPS Amit Kumar is posted to a lawless town and battles corrupt cops and brutal criminals, standing firm against danger to restore justice and order. Release Year: 2003 Director: Prakash Jha Awards: Best Screenplay Prakash Jha

programme.title: Tara Vs Bilal
programme.desc: Bilal, a carefree man, lives an easy-going life in London and falls in love with Tara, a sensitive woman, but is unable to express his feelings to her.

programme.title: Namastey London
programme.desc: On a trip to India, Jasmeet's father forcefully marries her off to Arjun. However, when they return to London, Jasmeet announces her intention of marrying her boyfriend, Charlie Brown.

programme.title: Vicky Vidya Ka Woh Wala Video
programme.desc: A newly married couple's relationship and reputation are put at risk when their CD is stolen. The story follows their roller coaster journey to recover the CD.

programme.title: Extraaa Storiez: Kantara
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Majhdhaar
programme.desc: Krishna loves Radha but they cannot marry against their parent's wishes. Although she is pregnant with Krishna's child, circumstances lead Radha to marry Gopal.

programme.title: The Making Of Pk
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Kgf: Chapter 1
programme.desc: A young man's promise to his dying mother leads him on a dangerous quest for power and wealth.

programme.title: Do Dilon Ke Khel Mein
programme.desc: Rohit and Isha happen to meet and take an intense dislike towards each other. When they realise that their parents, who are old friends, have decided to get them married, they start rebelling.

programme.title: Toolsidas Junior
programme.desc: Watching his father lose the 1994 Club Snooker Championship, 13-year-old Midi takes on the impossible journey to bring his father's name on the Winner's Board.

programme.title: Malaal
programme.desc: Two very different people from contrasting backgrounds experience the innocence of love.

programme.title: Major
programme.desc: The life of Maj. Sandeep Unnikrishnan, who fought against terrorists and was killed in action during the 2008 attacks at the Taj Palace Hotel in Mumbai, India.

programme.title: Kahan Shuru Kahan Khatam
programme.desc: A woman rejects her arranged marriage, sparking a chaotic chase as she tries to escape the wedding, while the groom and his family try to catch her.

programme.title: Haseen Dillruba
programme.desc: Under investigation as a suspect in her husband's murder, a wife reveals details of their thorny marriage that seem to only further blur the truth.

programme.title: Bhool Bhulaiya 3
programme.desc: Rooh Baba steps into a spooky estate and faces two mysterious spirit, both claiming to be Manjulika.

programme.title: Mahavatar Narsimha
programme.desc: Hiranyakashyap, a demon, challenges Vishnu, proclaiming himself a god. However, his son Prahlad remains devoted to Vishnu, who appears as Narsimha to defeat the demon.

programme.title: Extraa Shots Ludo
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Do Aur Do Paanch
programme.desc: Two rival burglars end up at the same school with the intent of abducting a rich man's son for a large ransom.

programme.title: The Making: Azhar
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: 12th Fail
programme.desc: IPS officer Manoj Kumar Sharma embarks on a fearless journey to restart his academic pursuit, aiming to conquer the world's toughest competitive exam.

programme.title: Awaargi
programme.desc: Azad rescues a girl from a brothel, attracting the ire of the mob, and helps her achieve her dream with Dhiren's aid. However, both the men fall in love with her while the mobs seek revenge on Azad.

programme.title: Dil Toh Baccha Hai Ji
programme.desc: Three roommates are in search of true love. They each find a girl with whom they fall head over heels in love with. Now they just have to get the women to reciprocate

programme.title: Pati Patni Aur Woh - 2019
programme.desc: Chintu Tyagi is an ordinary, middle class man who finds himself torn between his wife and another woman.

programme.title: Criminal
programme.desc: Ajay Kumar, a successful and famous doctor, is on a quest to prove his innocence when he is accused of murdering his wife Swetha. He seeks the help of Ramya, a cop who secretly loves him.

programme.title: Metro In Dino
programme.desc: The bittersweet stories of four urban-dwelling couples intertwine as they navigate the complexities and joys of relationships in modern-day India.

programme.title: Khel Khel Mein

programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hotel 88
programme.desc: The Secrets of Hotel 88 dives into a gripping story of the estranged Fernandez brothers - Martin, Gio and Kiko - who unexpectedly inherit Hotel 88 following their father's death. In prison, he had a revelation: he discovered his tenor voice and began listening to opera. He would become a singer.

programme.title: Hip-Hop A Quebec... La Voi(X/E) D'une Communaute
programme.desc: In the Quebec region, the birthplace of ''queb rap'', the history of hip-hop is about the emergence of a long sidelined community. programme.desc: Henri hopes that everything will be perfect for the official opening of his restaurant whilst Judeline wants to use the event as an opportunity to make an important announcement.

programme.title: Movie - Velaiyilla Pattathari 2
programme.desc: When Raghuvaran, a civil engineer, declines a job offer from businesswoman Vasundhara, she makes it her mission to trouble him.

programme.title: Movie - Paarvai Ondre Pothume
programme.desc: Manoj becomes a successful hotelier through his hard work and helps his best friend, Vinod, by giving him a job. Their friendship is put to the test when both of them fall in love with Neetha.

programme.title: Movie - Nimidangal
programme.desc: A man manages to find a job in the city. There, he befriends a young girl and finds love. Things change after he falls into the trap of a blackmailer.

programme.title: Movie - Ninaithaley
programme.desc: Rupa, an orphan, is dismayed when her marriage is called off on her wedding day. Anand, who comes to attend her wedding, falls for her. Will Rupa give relationship a second chance?

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Little John
programme.desc: To please his girlfriend's parents, John seeks the help of a god-man to make him invisible, but unfortunately he shrinks in size. To return to his normal state, he must procure a magic ring.

programme.title: Movie - Sondhakaran
programme.desc: A vengeful criminal frames a policeman for sexual assault. After serving his sentence, he starts working as a watchman and saves the residents of a building from a fraudster who runs a chit fund.

programme.title: Movie - Vinnukkum Mannukkum
programme.desc: A village leader is adored by the people. His brother returns to the village and wishes to marry the girl he dreams of. They learn that the girl is an actress and the elder brother approaches her with the proposal, but she refuses.

programme.title: Movie - Poomagal Oorvalam
programme.desc: Sarvanan, adopted by a childless couple, falls in love with Kavitha, the daughter of a caste-obsessed Sengodan. He tries to change Sengodan's attitude in order to marry Kavitha.

programme.title: Movie - Poove Unakkaga
programme.desc: Raja learns that the girl he loves is in love with another man. When he comes to know about the long-standing dispute between both their families, he goes to their village to unite them.

programme.title: Movie - En Mana Vaanil
programme.desc: Ganesh, who is born mute, falls in love with the affluent Thilaka, who is deaf and mute. When they elope, Thilaka's fiance pursues them and tries to split the duo. Will Ganesh and Thilaka ever unite?

programme.title: Movie - Nirantharam
programme.desc: Nirantharam - The Incessant is a 1995 Tamil-language drama film, written and directed by C. Rajendra Prasad.

programme.title: Movie - Odipolama
programme.desc: Visu, a computer science student, falls in love with Anjali and comes to live in her locality. But problems force Anjali to make a tough decision, and she runs away from her home.

programme.title: Movie - Pooveli
programme.desc: The views and opinions of four people on love and romance change as time passes by, while they struggle to hold on to their theories.

programme.title: Movie - Kannodu Kanpathellam
programme.desc: Sitharam is in love with Kalyani and decides to propose to her. However, when two lovers, Akhila and Akash, play a prank on Sitharam which leads to him losing Kalyani, he takes revenge on them.

programme.title: Movie - Enaintha Kaikal
programme.desc: At the request of a desperate mother, an ex-army man sets out to rescue her son who is being held in a military prison. Another man is on a mission to kidnap that prisoner and kill the ex-army man.

programme.title: Movie - Maha Nadigan
programme.desc: Sathya, a junior artiste, manages to secure a chance to play a hero in a movie. As his fame gradually increases, he is ambitious to become the chief minister of the state.

The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

Through candid conversations and storytelling, the programme sets the scene for the tournament and highlights the growing profile of women’s cricket on the world stage.

programme.title: PL BEST OF... PREMIER LEAGUE FRENCH CONNECTION
programme.desc: A celebration of France's greatest football icons, featuring Thierry Henry, David Ginola, Robert Pires, Claude Makelele, Emmanuel Petit and many more.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 1
programme.desc: We sit down with Lee Bowyer to look back on the career of one of the Premier League's fiercest and most competitive midfielders. From his rise at Charlton to becoming a key figure in the brilliant Leeds United side that challenged Europe's elite and reached the Champions League semi-finals, Bowyer reflects on the highs, controversies and defining moments of his career, including spells with West Ham, Newcastle and Birmingham.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: Set against one of the most dramatic seasons in recent memory, we explore the enduring intensity of the North London rivalry between Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur. We trace the origins of a feud shaped by geography, identity and decades of defining moments. We interweave the story of this season, which has reshaped the balance of power in North London and brings a fresh perspective to a rivalry already steeped in history.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS - EP 5
programme.desc: A strand that heroes the Premier League stars who could play leading roles for their national teams competing in the FIFA World Cup 2026 this summer. Through wide-ranging interview, archive and a bespoke creative treatment, these films tell each player's individual story, their journey to stardom and the impact they could make for their nations on the world's biggest stage.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS - EP 1
programme.desc: A strand that heroes the Premier League stars who could play leading roles for their national teams competing in the FIFA World Cup 2026 this summer. programme.desc: From free-kicks to solo runs, scissor kicks to 30-yard screamers, Goals of the Season revisits some of the most memorable strikes from the 25/26 campaign, whilst paying homage to the Golden Boot winner.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 24
programme.desc: We head to London to unveil the two newest inductee's into the Premier League Hall of fame. Hosted by Kelly Cates, and with a who's who of footballing royalty in attendance, we go behind the curtain to give you exclusive access to the hottest ticket in town.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 27
programme.desc: We sit down for an exclusive interview with the second of two new Premier League Hall of fame inductees, Gary Neville. From his journey from Class of '92 prodigy to Premier League Hall of Fame icon, he talks us through the moments that defined his legacy at Manchester United. A story on one of the league's most influential right-backs and a leader whose impact still shapes English football today.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: Set against one of the most dramatic seasons in recent memory, we explore the enduring intensity of the North London rivalry between Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur. We trace the origins of a feud shaped by geography, identity and decades of defining moments. We interweave the story of this season, which has reshaped the balance of power in North London and brings a fresh perspective to a rivalry already steeped in history.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (ARS)
programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. programme.title: PL GOATS - EP 5
programme.desc: Julia Stuart is joined by Ian Wright, Kolo Toure & Mikel John Obi to discuss the influence of African football on the Premier League.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - ERLING HAALAND'S 100
programme.desc: We celebrate Erling Haaland's record-breaking haul in true Netbusters' style, showcasing every one of his 100 Premier League goals, squeezed into a special 26-minute show.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 40
programme.desc: Tyler Adams' story is one of dedication, commitment and sacrifice. From the early days when his mother would drive him hundreds of miles to training to pursue a dream, to the influence of his stepfather and three brothers, Adams' journey from MLS prospect to Premier League star has been a fascinating one.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 2
programme.desc: Ahead of the World Cup, we revisit the rise of current USA manager Mauricio Pochettino's unforgettable Tottenham Hotspur side; the team that transformed Spurs from top-four hopefuls into genuine challengers at home and in Europe. Playing fearless, high-intensity football and built around a young core of stars, Pochettino's Spurs came within touching distance of Premier League and Champions League glory, creating some of the club's greatest modern nights along the way.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 1
programme.desc: We sit down with Lee Bowyer to look back on the career of one of the Premier League's fiercest and most competitive midfielders. From his rise at Charlton to becoming a key figure in the brilliant Leeds United side that challenged Europe's elite and reached the Champions League semi-finals, Bowyer reflects on the highs, controversies and defining moments of his career, including spells with West Ham, Newcastle and Birmingham.

programme.title: FS MMA Jakub Wiklacz vs. Sebastian Przybysz
programme.desc: This episode of FIGHT SPORTS MMA showcases action from KSW 86 in Wroclaw, Poland where the fight of the evening saw bantamweight champion Jakub Wiklacz face Sebastian Przybysz for the fourth time in his career.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Sergio Martinez vs. Paul Williams I
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features middleweights Sergio 'Maravilla' Martinez (44-1, 24 KOs) vs. Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (37-1, 27 KOs) from Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on December 5, 2009. The result was a controversial majority decision, and the two would eventually square off in a rematch about a year later.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode, we see the best of the Judo Grand Slam from Tbilisi, Georgia, where judo is one of the most popular sports in the country.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Joe Calzaghe vs. Roy Jones Jr.
programme.desc: This episode features a Light Heavyweight superfight billed as "Battle of the Superpowers" between an unbeaten Joe Calzaghe in what would be his last professional fight battling with former champ Roy Jones, Jr., as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Juan Manuel Marquez vs. Marco Antonio Barrera
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a battle of multiple-weight world champions, as Juan Manuel Marquez challenges Marco Antonio Barrera for the WBC super featherweight title.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 4 from from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan features Hoshoryu, Shimanaoumi, Yutakayama and Chiyonokuni.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 3: Tokyo, Japan - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Kyokushin Karate and the Martial Art of Hands, Feet and Breaking featuring Masters Shihan Yuzo Goda and Shihan Isamu Fukuda.

programme.title: FS MMA Jakub Wiklacz vs. Sebastian Przybysz

programme.title: MEGA Fights Paul Malignaggi vs. Edner Cherry
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features Super Lightweights Paul 'Magic Man' Malignaggi (21-1, 5 KOs) vs. Edner 'Cherry Bomb' Cherry (21-4, 10 KOs) from the Hammerstein Ballroom in New York, New York, USA on February 17, 2007.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Weapons Championship at the ISKA US Open Championships held at Disney World, Orlando, FL, USA.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Andre Berto vs. David Estrada
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a bout to determine a new NABF welterweight champion, as Andre Berto faces David Estrada. Also on the card, kickboxing legends Errol Zimmerman and Daniel Ghita battle to a gruesome end.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 5 from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan features Takakeisho, Hokutofuji, Terunofuji and Shimanoumi.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Chris Arreola vs. Jameel McCline
programme.desc: This episode features a Heavyweight title bout between the unbeaten current champ Chris Arreola taking on the hard hitting veteran Jameel McCline, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode features Michael Bisping as he talks about his fame, Dominick Cruz in the announcer's booth and Tito Ortiz shows off his house.

programme.title: FS MMA Tama Chan vs. Jan Finney
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Jan "Cuddles" Finney faces off against Tama Chan where Finney looks to put the squeeze on Japan's Tama Chan in Costa Rica.

The Squirrels have all sorts of questions to ask.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 1
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels meet a lion with unfortunate breath and teach him a special song to help him learn how to brush his teeth.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 52

Happy thinks he needs glasses, but Mole explains he can't wear them for stunts as they keep falling off his nose. Luckily Duggee has his Glasses Badge, so he has an idea how they can fix them.

programme.desc: The Squirrels learn what a favourite is, but have trouble deciding what their own favourite things are, so they make a film asking some of their friends what is special to them to help narrow it down.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 28
programme.desc: The Squirrels go on the trail of a lost herd of cattle with Duggee and his old pal Rodeo Horse, who teaches them how to be cowhands... and earn their Round Up Badges in the process!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 20
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 43
programme.desc: When Glitch heads to Grim HQ to make amends after an argument, Ubercorn is accidentally trapped as Glitch heads to the most remote place on earth: Point Nemo, in the middle of the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits Theatre, it's Strawberry, who used to be insecure, but now can't wait to celebrate herself and sing her song, See the Seeds!

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits Theatre, it's the speedy dancing runner beans!

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Evil Pea and the Mini Peas take over the Tato Tower HQ and lock Supertato out.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Chilli's heat helps Supertato to stop Evil Pea from freezing over the whole supermarket.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 63
programme.desc: Tinky Winky and Laa-­Laa are in Home Dome when the Tubby Phone rings. It's Dipsy and Po calling from the Tubby Mobile to say 'Hello'.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S05 - EP 17
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'bread' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today's episode is all about bread - brown bread, flat bread, long bread, toasted bread, butterfly bread and rainbow bread. Dee and a friend roll it in a ball bread and we see a 'wear it on a your head' bread.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S03 - EP 21
programme.desc: Zim and Zam have discovered the lost city of Micro OKIDO. There is just one problem - it's on the exact spot that Mayor Oki wants to place his new statue. It's up to Messy to help save the city.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 34
programme.desc: Nori and Dot are stuck in a treehouse without a door. How can Mojo and Bo get them out? By sending the treehouse flying across town, that's how!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 34
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 33
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 8
programme.desc: The Squirrels are playing outside, when out of a bush jumps the cutest creature they ever did see. They think it is simply adorable and tell it so... with startling results. The creature bursts into tears! The creature, whose name is Plinky, tells them her whole family are monsters, and that's what she's supposed to be, but she just cannot get the hang of it. The Squirrels are keen to help Plinky get in touch with her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 7
programme.desc: It's news time at the Clubhouse, and the Squirrels share their exciting news of the week with each other. Happy got a new bath sponge, Norrie is growing a sunflower and Roly, after thinking hard if he's got any news at all, remembers he's getting a new brother or sister. The Squirrels have all sorts of questions to ask.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 16
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 9
programme.desc: When Grandmaster Glitch builds his effigy in ice, his digging threatens the Lambert Glacier in Antarctica.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 28
programme.desc: A game of 'grannies' is fun, until Bluey and Bingo can't agree on one simple question: Can Grannies dance? Now they need to video call Nana to get the answer.

programme.desc: It's time for Bluey and Bingo to get out of the bath. But Dad has decided not to tell them what to do and gets roped into a game of Burger Shop.

programme.desc: Bingo and Lila are excited to play on their new waterslide.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 47
programme.desc: During a friendly game of neighbourhood cricket, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: When some new grizzly bears arrive at the park during a hot summer, it's up to Andy to make sure they have everything they need to help them get rid of their winter coats. Andy jets off in his safari mobile to North America to find the answer.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie play a fun game of 'Wavey Wavey Snap' using some giant, silly gloves.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 3
programme.desc: It's Duggee's Day Off but it's not long before the Squirrels show up to tell him about their adventures on their own days off... earning their Day Off badges in the process!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 2

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 1
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels meet a lion with unfortunate breath and teach him a special song to help him learn how to brush his teeth.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 14
programme.desc: When a cold-ridden Glitch's sneezing breaks his TV, the Grimbots take him to the Virunga National Park in the Democratic Republic of the Congo to see a real mountain gorilla. But Glitch doesn't realise how dangerous his cold germs can be, so the Go Jetters will have to stop him from making a baby gorilla sick - all while trying to keep it safe from dangerous traps left by hunters.

programme.desc: Glitch fills Cheddar Gorge with a river of melted cheese, turning it into a giant cheese fondue. Can the Go Jetters rescue the tourists and sheep from the cheesiest glitch ever?

programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 33
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 8
programme.desc: The Squirrels are playing outside, when out of a bush jumps the cutest creature they ever did see. They think it is simply adorable and tell it so... with startling results. The creature bursts into tears! The creature, whose name is Plinky, tells them her whole family are monsters, and that's what she's supposed to be, but she just cannot get the hang of it. The Squirrels are keen to help Plinky get in touch with her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 7
programme.desc: It's news time at the Clubhouse, and the Squirrels share their exciting news of the week with each other. Happy got a new bath sponge, Norrie is growing a sunflower and Roly, after thinking hard if he's got any news at all, remembers he's getting a new brother or sister. The Squirrels have all sorts of questions to ask.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 16
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 9
programme.desc: When Grandmaster Glitch builds his effigy in ice, his digging threatens the Lambert Glacier in Antarctica.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 28
programme.desc: A game of 'grannies' is fun, until Bluey and Bingo can't agree on one simple question: Can Grannies dance? Now they need to video call Nana to get the answer.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 31
programme.desc: It's time for Bluey and Bingo to get out of the bath. But Dad has decided not to tell them what to do and gets roped into a game of Burger Shop.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 46
programme.desc: Bingo and Lila are excited to play on their new waterslide.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 47
programme.desc: During a friendly game of neighbourhood cricket, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: When some new grizzly bears arrive at the park during a hot summer, it's up to Andy to make sure they have everything they need to help them get rid of their winter coats. Andy jets off in his safari mobile to North America to find the answer.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie play a fun game of 'Wavey Wavey Snap' using some giant, silly gloves.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 3
programme.desc: It's Duggee's Day Off but it's not long before the Squirrels show up to tell him about their adventures on their own days off... earning their Day Off badges in the process!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 2
programme.desc: The clubhouse is inundated with stray ducklings who think Norrie is their mum, so Duggee and the Squirrels need to do some detective work to reunite them with their real mum.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 1
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels meet a lion with unfortunate breath and teach him a special song to help him learn how to brush his teeth.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 14
programme.desc: When a cold-ridden Glitch's sneezing breaks his TV, the Grimbots take him to the Virunga National Park in the Democratic Republic of the Congo to see a real mountain gorilla. But Glitch doesn't realise how dangerous his cold germs can be, so the Go Jetters will have to stop him from making a baby gorilla sick - all while trying to keep it safe from dangerous traps left by hunters.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 13
programme.desc: Glitch fills Cheddar Gorge with a river of melted cheese, turning it into a giant cheese fondue. Can the Go Jetters rescue the tourists and sheep from the cheesiest glitch ever?

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 4
programme.desc: Percy causes confusion for everyone and prompts delays, when he spends too much time panicking over nothing.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 13
programme.desc: Rainbow gets to experience the night for the first time.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 14
programme.desc: When Sarah and Duck's favourite bench is in use, the pair find other things to do in the park.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: Seamus has booked the wrong date for his and Little Woo's holiday. Stanley repurposes the locations of the town into activities and sights to give them a holiday in a day.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: Stanley helps Fifi and Fred dig up some shiny stones in their garden that turn out to be old bits of mosaic. With the help of Cynthia and Hettie, they put the pieces back together.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 25
programme.desc: Water fights, bodyboarding and ice cream. The funny little animals chat about going on holiday.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S01 - EP 35
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran head to the library, but the children's section is closed for redecoration!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 29
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 30
programme.desc: Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 31
programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 30
programme.desc: When the Squirrels see Duggee practicing his impressive Topiary skills they are keen to try some of their own - and promptly put their new talents into practice in order to tame some very wild woods!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 29
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn what a favourite is, but have trouble deciding what their own favourite things are, so they make a film asking some of their friends what is special to them to help narrow it down.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 44
programme.desc: Glitch has taken Tala on holiday to Slovenia's Postojna Caves, and she is looking forward to finding a rare creature called an olm for her class project. Ubercorn and Lars join them.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Potato dedicating a song to his uncle Spud, who went on a spaceship to the moon.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits Theatre, it's Strawberry, who used to be insecure, but now can't wait to celebrate herself and sing her song, See the Seeds!

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Chilli's heat helps Supertato to stop Evil Pea from freezing over the whole supermarket.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: It's a space race to fulfil Carrot's dream of being the first Veggie on the cheese moon.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 64
programme.desc: The Teletubbies go on a very special picnic together. Lots of Tubby Toast pops out of the Dup Dup and lands on the picnic plates for the Teletubbies to munch.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S05 - EP 18
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'blanket' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different blankets - a blue blanket, a baby blanket, a woolly blanket and a picnic blanket! Dee hops around on a patchwork blanket and we see her and a friend wrap up in a warm blanket.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S03 - EP 22
programme.desc: Messy travels back to the start of the universe to find out where everything came from.

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: Cleve Kelso breaks Rafaela Moreno and a dangerous, cybernetic prisoner named Matsuo Mori from a high-security ice prison. Back in LA, Tony and the crew experience a major shake-up when Echo gets accepted to Ms. Nowhere’s spy training but Tony is rejected. While Tony is grappling with his identity crisis, Echo struggles to survive spy school, and Ms. Nowhere and Gary disappear in a massive North African storm during their hunt for Cleve. Echo must lead the Toretto crew and finish Ms.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: The team travels to Nihaya, or "The Dead End," in their pursuit of Nowhere’s mission. Unfortunately they run into some of Layla’s spurned former criminal partner Sandocal, who steals the kids’ cars for revenge on Layla. With Frostee, Cisco, and Echo held captive, Tony and Layla drive for Sandocal in a dune buggy race to win back their crew’s freedom.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: The kids are low on supplies in the Sahara and stumble on a town with a well that has mysteriously run dry. The crew decides to investigate and discovers a Cleve Kelso-controlled water facility that’s stealing water from the village. They manage to blow up the facility, but it alerts Rafaela and Matsuo to their whereabouts.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: In an awesome chase/battle through the desert, the crew goes up against Rafaela, Matsuo, and Sandocal - who are driving the kids’ own cars. The crew struggles to fight back while also not losing the trail to Cleve’s base in the desert. When Rafaela turns on Sandocal, he and Layla decide to work together and manage to overpower Rafaela and Matsuo. Sandocal tells the kids to go to escape toward the Bedouin Shield.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 15

Melman, accustomed to getting lots of attention as the baby of the group, worries that Kate loving Lucia will mean less love and attention for him!

programme.title: Landline (2026) - EP 16
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: Back Roads S12 - EP 2
programme.desc: Lisa Millar continues her exploration of Shark Bay, a World Heritage listed wilderness on the westernmost point of Western Australia. It's a vivid contrast of turquoise waters and red desert cliffs.

programme.title: Australian Story (2026) - EP 16
programme.desc: In 2026, Logie-award-winning documentary program Australian Story celebrates 30 years sharing compelling stories about real people that illuminate, entertain and inspire. The power of the personal. Presented by Leigh Sales.

programme.title: Gardening Australia S37 - EP 16
programme.desc: Hannah visits a fairytale garden with its own castle, Tammy plants up a colourful begonia basket, Costa revisits an urban park, Millie connects with a native plant expert and Josh meets a creative couple in their garden.

programme.title: Dr Karl's How Things Work S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Dr Karl takes a peek inside the Bundaberg Ginger Beer Master Brewery. From the ginger farm to the packing line, he examines how this iconic soft drink - made from a spice and then fermented - is produced.

programme.title: The World (2026) - EP 90
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026) - EP 115
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026) - EP 115

programme.title: A Bite To Eat With Alice S1 - EP 43
programme.desc: Leading lady Lucy Durack arrives with one of her favourite ingredients, bananas. She also has a big challenge for Alice, how can she get her kids to eat more vegetables??

programme.title: Halftime Report
programme.desc: "Halftime Report" is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report
programme.desc: "Halftime Report" is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: Global Watch
programme.desc: GLOBAL WATCH is a 60 minute-long news program. The show stresses Chinese elements, emphasizing China’s perspective, policies and stories. The program, relying on global reporting resources, presents in-depth analysis and coverage of major global issues, from a Chinese perspective on international affairs. The program presents to-the-point interpretation of Chinese policies and stories that are of interest to foreign audiences, in a style they are familiar with.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. programme.title: Asia Today
programme.desc: Asia Today highlights the latest news and social developments across Asia. Correspondents in over a dozen countries report on the region’s top stories as they happen. programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 52 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 53 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Dee Girls Talk - EP 513

programme.title: Made In Taiwan
programme.desc: "Made In Taiwan" records the rich and diverse history and humanities, local specialties, natural landscapes, as well as special ecology, plant research and other natural ecology, character close-ups, mountain scenery and etc., as the "Made In Taiwan" theme content. programme.title: Kangsi Coming
programme.desc: Lead by Kevin Tsai and Dee Hsu, who never fail to entertain their audience by the fast-paced, humorous and fully self-aware hosting style. programme.title: Hit the Headlines
programme.desc: Headline Talk Show is a political show co-hosted by anchor Zhou Yuqin and director of the political center Lin Jiayuan. "Headline Talk Show" is the most daring-speak-out TV show. We speak out your voice!

programme.title: ANGELS OF MISSION - EP 15
programme.desc: Three fearless women in the Counter-Terrorism Unit (CTU) tackle terrorist threats, criminal schemes and high-risk undercover missions. As they confront danger on the job, they also face love and betrayal, testing their courage and friendship in a world where trust can be deadly.

programme.title: The Map Of Truth & What's On Today - EP 17
programme.desc: Zhuang Yichen creates an online "mystery map" channel exposing the supernatural elements of Hong Kong. Skeptical influencer Bi Ping challenges his claims, sparking rivalries and revelations that force both to confront hidden truths.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2825
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: Generation to Generation - EP 1
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The series follows Cai Zhao (Bao Shangen), a calm and collected girl, and Mu Qingyan (Zhou Yiran), a decisive young master. While resolving historical conflicts together between different martial arts factions they also fall in love.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2229
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 12
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Sin-chuen is unhappy about the prospect of Lam Ching becoming vice chairman, so she takes her to some road on the hill where she slaps and insults her. Family members react strongly to Yeung-tin’s decision to promote Lam Ching, and Wun-chau dissuades them.

programme.title: Strange Tales of Tang Dynasty III to Changan - EP 9
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Amid Chang'an's power shifts, Lu Lingfeng and Su Wuming lead their detective team back to the capital, turning a teahouse into a covert base. They tackle bizarre cases from haunted temples to court plots, culminating in a polo match that tests their fates.

programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 14
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Yeung-tin collapses. Lam Ching hosts the press conference by herself and declares she won’t resign as trust executor. Meanwhile, Yau-wai incites craftsmen to collectively resign. Under the guidance of Ko Sham, Lam Ching uses kindness and coercion to negotiate with the employees.

programme.title: Strange Tales of Tang Dynasty III to Changan - EP 11
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Amid Chang'an's power shifts, Lu Lingfeng and Su Wuming lead their detective team back to the capital, turning a teahouse into a covert base. programme.title: Golden City (Ep 901-950) VVD Mandarin - EP 903
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Country Spirit - EP 9
programme.desc: KOO SAI LUNG (CHUN PUI) is the manager of a wine factory. He adopts his ex-girlfriend’s illegitimate son, SHUNG (LAM KA TUNG), out of kindness. SHUNG is cheerful and tolerates any kind of abuse._x000D__x000D_ LUNG’s sister, YIU (TANG SHUI MAN), loves SHUNG. However, she cannot forget her former love KOU (TSANG WAI KUEN) who is dead. _x000D__x000D_ LUNG’s only son, SAN (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) serves in the army. The family has not heard from him for a long time and assumes that he is dead.

programme.title: The Driving Power - EP 5
programme.desc: MUI (CHENG SIU CHOW, ADAM) is a middle-aged man who has never had a proper job. Throughout his life, he has been relying on his family and living like a playboy. His biggest achievements are marrying a singer, YUNG (YIP TUNG, CECILIA) and raising their daughter CHU (YE MICHELLE). MUI and YUNG love each other very much even after being married for more than 20 years. However, deep down, MUI is still a playboy._x000D__x000D_ MUI’s uncle asks him to take care of his nightclub, which delights him.

programme.title: Treasure of Destiny - EP 17
programme.desc: Pork butcher stall lady boss Chu Ying-kiu (Katy Kung) has innate mystical power. But she is inflicted with some strange illness that causes her to grow a beard. She hopes to find the elixir mentioned in Sutra of Forty-two Chapters for treating her illness. Over the years, university Chinese language professor Cheung King (Moses Chan) has been passionate about finding this legendary treasure. However, he has been suffering from insomnia as he was devastated in an incident.

programme.title: Legend Of Demigods - EP 20
programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared.

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 17
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. However, their success upsets a junket promoter-turned-land developer, KO TIN-TSAU (Hugo Ng), who keeps suppressing them. WAI-SHUN is even betrayed by his close confidant TSU CHI-LIK (Mat Yeung).

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 18
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. However, their success upsets a junket promoter-turned-land developer, KO TIN-TSAU (Hugo Ng), who keeps suppressing them. WAI-SHUN is even betrayed by his close confidant TSU CHI-LIK (Mat Yeung).

programme.title: Country Spirit - EP 9
programme.desc: KOO SAI LUNG (CHUN PUI) is the manager of a wine factory. He adopts his ex-girlfriend’s illegitimate son, SHUNG (LAM KA TUNG), out of kindness. SHUNG is cheerful and tolerates any kind of abuse._x000D__x000D_ LUNG’s sister, YIU (TANG SHUI MAN), loves SHUNG. However, she cannot forget her former love KOU (TSANG WAI KUEN) who is dead. _x000D__x000D_ LUNG’s only son, SAN (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) serves in the army. The family has not heard from him for a long time and assumes that he is dead.

programme.title: The Driving Power - EP 5
programme.desc: MUI (CHENG SIU CHOW, ADAM) is a middle-aged man who has never had a proper job. Throughout his life, he has been relying on his family and living like a playboy. His biggest achievements are marrying a singer, YUNG (YIP TUNG, CECILIA) and raising their daughter CHU (YE MICHELLE). MUI and YUNG love each other very much even after being married for more than 20 years. However, deep down, MUI is still a playboy._x000D__x000D_ MUI’s uncle asks him to take care of his nightclub, which delights him.

programme.title: Treasure of Destiny - EP 17
programme.desc: Pork butcher stall lady boss Chu Ying-kiu (Katy Kung) has innate mystical power. But she is inflicted with some strange illness that causes her to grow a beard. She hopes to find the elixir mentioned in Sutra of Forty-two Chapters for treating her illness. Over the years, university Chinese language professor Cheung King (Moses Chan) has been passionate about finding this legendary treasure. However, he has been suffering from insomnia as he was devastated in an incident.

programme.title: Legend Of Demigods - EP 20
programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared.

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 17
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. However, their success upsets a junket promoter-turned-land developer, KO TIN-TSAU (Hugo Ng), who keeps suppressing them. WAI-SHUN is even betrayed by his close confidant TSU CHI-LIK (Mat Yeung).

programme.title: The Driving Power - EP 6
programme.desc: MUI (CHENG SIU CHOW, ADAM) is a middle-aged man who has never had a proper job. Throughout his life, he has been relying on his family and living like a playboy. His biggest achievements are marrying a singer, YUNG (YIP TUNG, CECILIA) and raising their daughter CHU (YE MICHELLE). programme.title: Treasure of Destiny - EP 18
programme.desc: Pork butcher stall lady boss Chu Ying-kiu (Katy Kung) has innate mystical power. But she is inflicted with some strange illness that causes her to grow a beard. She hopes to find the elixir mentioned in Sutra of Forty-two Chapters for treating her illness. Over the years, university Chinese language professor Cheung King (Moses Chan) has been passionate about finding this legendary treasure. However, he has been suffering from insomnia as he was devastated in an incident. Math genius Siu Kwai-chi (Kamen Kong) is clever and smart. She falls in love at first sight with A&E male nurse Orr Kin-ning (Kalok Chow). Kwai-chi is torn between good and evil. And she really wants to find the treasure as she hopes to become an overnight millionaire. Fate brings Cheung King, Ying-kiu and Kwai-chi together. They come up with all kinds of schemes as they each want to snatch the treasure. While they compete with each other, a war on the human conscience’s immorality and righteousness has started. And it is a life-and -death struggle …

programme.title: Legend Of Demigods - EP 21
programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. But, HESHEN comes prepared. He not only manages to solve this crisis, but also turns the tables, exposing the secret of ROYAL NOBLE CONSORT (Selena Lee), making JIAQING caught in the crossfire!
